fields_present.source_type: text — 'article' or 'youtube' or other source type labels
fields_present.title: text — present on all rows, used as display title
fields_present.author: text — nullable, often null
fields_present.accessed_at: timestamp — when the source was accessed
fields_present.snippet: text — brief description of the source
fields_present.why_it_matters: text — reasoning for why this source matters
fields_present.metadata: jsonb — contains additional fields like lane, type, score, etc.

fields_missing_vs_ui_expectations.lane: NOT a top-level column — stored in metadata.lane
fields_missing_vs_ui_expectations.type: NOT a top-level column — stored in metadata.type or derived from source_type
fields_missing_vs_ui_expectations.score: NOT a top-level column — stored in metadata.score or use confidence
fields_missing_vs_ui_expectations.status: NOT a top-level column — stored in metadata.status, defaults to 'scored'
fields_missing_vs_ui_expectations.reason: NOT a top-level column — use why_it_matters or snippet
fields_missing_vs_ui_expectations.nextAction: NOT a top-level column — stored in metadata.nextAction
fields_missing_vs_ui_expectations.convertOptions: NOT a top-level column — stored in metadata.convertOptions
fields_missing_vs_ui_expectations.revenueRange: NOT a top-level column — stored in metadata.revenueRange

mapping_notes: UI expects 'lane' — must read from metadata.lane or default to 'research'
UI expects 'type' — must read from metadata.type or derive from source_type
UI expects 'score' — must use confidence or metadata.score
UI expects 'reason' — must use why_it_matters or snippet
UI expects 'status' — must read from metadata.status or default to 'scored'
UI expects 'nextAction' — must read from metadata.nextAction or default text
UI expects 'convertOptions' — must read from metadata.convertOptions or default array
All .replace() calls must be guarded with safeStr() or safeReplace()
